actionEn: An intersection is ahead, the plate schematically shows the directions — choose the correct lane in advance.

nameEn: Advance direction sign on the motorway
actionEn: Advance notice of a junction/exit on the motorway — change into the correct lane in good time.
Directions are shown before entering the motorway.
The plate beside the road shows the direction and destination.
The plate above the road helps you choose the correct lane in advance.
A direction sign beside the motorway.
A sign above the motorway — choose the correct lane in advance.
The motorway entrance is approaching, shown at the side.
The motorway entrance is shown overhead.
The arrow shows the exact direction to the road with the stated number — turn that way.
The arrow shows the direction to the destination.
The arrow shows the direction together with the remaining distance to the destination.
Direction to the city outskirts (bypass road).
Direction to the city centre (Centrum).
Direction to the airport.
Direction to the railway station.
Direction to the bus station.
Direction to the car ferry.
Direction to the boat landing/mooring place.
Direction to the beach or swimming area.
Direction to the museum.
Direction to a historic monument (tourist site).
Direction to a natural monument (reserve, etc.).
Direction to a scenic viewpoint.
Direction to a scenic viewpoint.
The board states the distance to cities ahead along the route.
The board shows which towns this road passes through — check your route.
Additional information about the road route.
You have entered a built-up area — reduce speed to the urban limit (usually 50 km/h).
You are leaving the built-up area — rural speed rules apply.
Direction to the bypass road (obwodnica) around the city.
A motorway exit junction is approaching — if you need to exit, change lanes in advance.
Additional information about the motorway exit.
You have entered the boundaries of an administrative district.
A tourist driving route begins.
The tourist driving route continues — follow the indicated direction.
The tourist driving route ends here.
